reviews.review_description:
This is an interesting one.
You can choose to play one of 4 pets… 2 dogs and 2 cats.

You roam about an house, and find various mini games.. even cooking food for your owner!

You can play pet videos on the tv in the living room!

I love the spinning cat and the dance tune!! Got my legs n head going lol

You can enter a portal that takes you to an assault course that’s against time.

It says you can enter other properties but I was yet to be able to do that.

I think this is aimed more at children, but it’s a fun and interesting experience.

reviews.review_title: A bunch of confusing ideas for a game
reviews.review_description:
At first is seems like an I Am Cat clone, but then they throw in an obstacle course in the style of a runner game. All the animals are the same, the only difference is the colour of the house you start in and the look of your paws. There's a handful of things to interact with but there's no point to any of it. 
It feels like they started out making a runner game but then threw in some pets after seeing the success of I Am Cat.

Not sure what to make of this one, it has some potential but feel early days.  You chose which pet to be and you roam around a house and play a few mini games.  I did have an issue as I seemed to be stuck just under the floor, and no matter how many times I tried to reset my play area I remained slightly below the floor level.  There seemed to be no options within menu to reset.  It will be interesting to see where this game goes in the future.
